assistant.title: AI work guide assistant
assistant.subtitle: Ask questions using registered guides, and open originals from the list on the right.
assistant.panelHint: Tap a card to read the full guide
assistant.originalFileHint: Open the original to view images, charts, and diagrams.

chatBot.welcome: Hello! I'm your work guide helper. Ask me anything.
chatBot.errorGeneric: Sorry, something went wrong while generating the answer. Please try again.
chatBot.title: AI work helper
chatBot.subtitle: Answers from guides · Tap references to open the source
chatBot.placeholder: Type a question… (Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline)

notices.title: Notices
notices.subtitle: Browse customer feedback notices by category, date, week, manager, or game.
notices.staffHint: Staff can create, edit, end, and delete notices here. The same actions are available from the main notice box.
notices.alertRequiredFields: Please fill label (display name), manager, category, content, and notice date.
notices.errorSaveGeneric: An error occurred while saving the notice.
notices.confirmEnd: End this notice? Ended notices show with strikethrough and end date.
notices.errorLoadGeneric: An error occurred while loading notices.
notices.errorMarkReadGeneric: An error occurred while marking as read.

handover.title: Handover log
handover.subtitle: Write and review handovers by date and shift (weekday / afternoon / night / noon).

workChecklist.title: Work checklist
workChecklist.subtitle: Check items as you complete them. Change the date to view past or future days.
workChecklist.workTypeHint: Pick the shift that matches your schedule (weekday, afternoon, night, noon, or inspection type 1/2) to see the right items.
workChecklist.assigneesBody: Based on the selected date, only accounts whose agent schedule (work type and weekday/specific day) match are shown by work type. The login user must be linked on the agent profile.
workChecklist.teamBody: Only people who must complete the checklist for the selected date and work type are listed (those on the agent schedule that day). Other agents do not appear.
workChecklist.noItemsForTeam: No items for this date/type; team view is hidden.
workChecklist.noAssignees: No assignees on schedule for this date/type. Check agent schedule (work type · weekday/specific day) and user linkage.
workChecklist.noCenterItems: No checklist items for this date. Inspection type 1·2 items are in the side panels.

notificationSettings.title: Desktop notifications
notificationSettings.deniedHint: Allow notifications in your browser settings.
notificationSettings.masterHint: Show new issues and important alerts on the desktop.
notificationSettings.soundHint: Play a sound when a notification appears.
notificationSettings.newIssueHint: Notify when a new issue is created.
notificationSettings.slaHint: Notify when an SLA is violated.
